title: carex × ciliatifructus
intro: Carex × ciliatifructus, a hybrid plant species in the sedge family, is also known as fang baik cao in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits of soothing inflammation and promoting overall well-being. In traditional herbal preparations, Carex × ciliatifructus is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and topical ointments, which can be used to address a range of health concerns.
